title: On the elasto-plastic filtration equation
summary: We study the fully nonlinear heat equation $b(\partial_tu)\partial_tu=Δu$ posed in a bounded domain with Dirichlet boundary conditions. Here $b(s)=b^-$ if $s<0$, $b(s)=b^+$ if $s>0$, $b^-\neq b^+$ being two positive constants. This equation models the flow of an elastic fluid in an elasto-plastic porous medium. We are interested in the existence and uniqueness of viscosity solutions and in their asymptotic behaviour as $t\to\infty$ and when $b^-\to 0^+$ or $b^+\to +\infty$. We also characterize solutions of the problem as limits of a minimization dynamic game.

AI.tldr: 研究具有不连续系数的完全非线性热方程的粘性解存在性、唯一性、渐近行为及其与动态博弈的联系
AI.motivation: 研究弹性流体在弹塑性多孔介质中流动的数学模型，该模型表现为系数不连续的完全非线性热方程，其中系数b(s)在s=0处跳跃，b⁻和b⁺是两个不同的正常数
AI.techniques: 粘性解理论、渐近分析、极限过程分析、动态博弈方法、变分原理
AI.main_theorems: 1. 粘性解的存在性和唯一性结果；2. 当t→∞时的渐近行为；3. 当b⁻→0⁺或b⁺→+∞时的极限行为；4. 将解刻画为最小化动态博弈的极限
AI.significance: 为具有不连续系数的非线性抛物方程提供了理论框架，建立了粘性解理论与动态博弈之间的联系，对多孔介质流动问题有重要应用价值

title: Geometric properties of optimizers for the maximum gradient of the torsion function
summary:
Consider $J(Ω):= \|
abla u_Ω\|_\infty/\sqrt{|Ω|} $ and $J_P(Ω):= \|
abla u_Ω\|_\infty/P(Ω) $, where $Ω$ is a planar convex domain, $u_Ω$ is the torsion function, $P(Ω)$ is the perimeter of $Ω$ and $|Ω|$ its area. We prove that there exist planar convex domains that maximize the functionals $J$ and $J_P$, and any maximizer has a $C^1$ boundary that contains a line segment on which $|
abla u_Ω|$ attains its maximum.

AI.tldr: 证明了平面凸区域上两个与扭转函数梯度相关的泛函存在最大值，且任何最大化区域具有C¹边界并在某线段上达到梯度最大值
AI.motivation: 研究平面凸区域上扭转函数梯度范数与区域几何量（面积、周长）比值的最大化问题，这是PDE优化中的经典问题，涉及Saint-Venant扭转问题中的几何优化
AI.techniques: 使用凸分析、变分方法、PDE理论（特别是扭转方程）、最大值原理、边界正则性分析，以及几何测度论中的紧性论证
AI.main_theorems: 证明了泛函J(Ω)=‖∇u_Ω‖_∞/√|Ω|和J_P(Ω)=‖∇u_Ω‖_∞/P(Ω)在平面凸区域类中存在最大值；任何最大化区域具有C¹边界，且存在边界线段使|∇u_Ω|达到其最大值
AI.significance: 为Saint-Venant扭转问题中的几何优化提供了严格理论基础，建立了最大化区域的正则性和结构性质，对PDE约束的几何优化问题有重要理论价值

title: Fractional calculus approach to models of adsorption: Barrier-diffusion control
summary: The mathematical model of surfactant adsorption under mixed barrier-diffusion control is analyzed using techniques from fractional calculus. The kinetic models of Henry, Langmuir, Frumkin, Volmer and van der Waals are considered. First, treating the Ward-Tordai integral equation as a fractional order one, the partial differential model is transformed into a single fractional ordinary differential equation for the adsorption. A transformation of the obtained equation is proposed that reduces the number of parameters to two dimensionless groups (at Frumkin and van der Waals models a third parameter appears). In the simplest case of Henry adsorption isotherm the fractional differential model depends on a single dimensionless group and an exact solution exists, represented in terms of Mittag-Leffler functions. Based on this solution, second order asymptotes (at small values of the adsorption) are derived for the other models. The asymptotes of the adsorption result in a higher order asymptotes for the surface pressure (surface tension). For small surface coverage, all considered models converge to the Henry model's predictions, making it a universal first-order approximation for the surface tension. Next, the fractional differential model is written as an integral equation %of fractional order that can be considered as a generalization of the well-known Ward-Tordai equation to the case of barrier-diffusion control. For computer simulation of the obtained integral equation a predictor-corrector numerical method is developed and numerical results are presented and discussed.

AI.tldr: 利用分数阶微积分方法分析混合势垒-扩散控制下的表面活性剂吸附模型，建立了分数阶微分模型并发展了数值解法。
AI.motivation: 研究表面活性剂在界面吸附的动力学过程，特别是混合势垒-扩散控制机制下的数学模型。传统的Ward-Tordai积分方程需要扩展到更复杂的控制机制，分数阶微积分为此提供了合适的数学框架。
AI.techniques: 分数阶微积分方法，将Ward-Tordai积分方程转化为分数阶微分方程；Mittag-Leffler函数精确解；渐近展开分析；预测-校正数值方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 将混合控制模型转化为单一分数阶常微分方程；2) Henry吸附等温线情况下的精确解（Mittag-Leffler函数表示）；3) 推导其他模型的二阶渐近解；4) 建立广义Ward-Tordai积分方程；5) 发展预测-校正数值方法。
AI.significance: 为表面活性剂吸附动力学提供了新的数学框架，将分数阶微积分引入界面科学；建立了混合控制机制的通用模型；发展了有效的数值计算方法，对胶体与界面科学有重要理论意义。

title: Normalized solutions of $L^2$ supercritical NLS equations in exterior domains with inhomogeneous nonlinearities
summary: This paper establishes the existence of normalized mountain pass solutions to the $L^2$-supercritical nonlinear Schrödinger equation with inhomogeneous nonlinearity $|x|^{-α}|u|^{p-2}u$ in exterior domains. In contrast, for the autonomous case ($α=0$), Appolloni \& Molle (2025) and Zhang \& Zhang (2022) showed that potential mountain pass solutions share the same energy levels as in $\mathbb{R}^N$, causing non-existence due to energy leakage to infinity. This work demonstrates that the physically motivated decaying term $|x|^{-α}$ breaks the scaling symmetry inherent in the autonomous case. Such breaking energetically separates the exterior domain problem from the whole space one and thereby prevents energy leakage. Using a novel min-max argument that combines monotonicity trick, Morse index estimates, and blow-up analysis, we prove the existence of a positive mountain pass solution for sufficiently small mass, revealing a new phenomenon of non-autonomous nonlinearities in non-compact domains.

AI.tldr: 证明了在外部区域中具有非齐次非线性项$|x|^{-\alpha}|u|^{p-2}u$的$L^2$-超临界非线性薛定谔方程存在归一化的山路解
AI.motivation: 研究$L^2$-超临界非线性薛定谔方程在外部区域中的归一化解存在性问题。自主情形($\alpha=0$)中，Appolloni & Molle (2025)和Zhang & Zhang (2022)发现山路解与全空间中的能量水平相同，导致能量向无穷远处泄漏而不存在解。本文研究非自主非线性项$|x|^{-\alpha}$如何改变这一现象。
AI.techniques: 结合单调性技巧、Morse指标估计和爆破分析的新颖min-max论证方法；利用非齐次项$|x|^{-\alpha}$破坏自主情形的尺度对称性；通过能量分离机制防止能量泄漏
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于充分小的质量，存在正的山路解；展示了非自主非线性项$|x|^{-\alpha}$在非紧区域中能有效分离外部区域问题与全空间问题的能量水平，从而避免能量泄漏
AI.significance: 揭示了非自主非线性项在非紧区域中的新现象；为$L^2$-超临界问题在外部区域中的解存在性提供了理论依据；发展了处理能量泄漏问题的新方法；对非线性薛定谔方程在非紧区域中的研究有重要理论意义

title: Fractional weighted Sobolev spaces associated to the Riesz fractional gradient
summary: In this work, we introduce a new family of functions spaces, the weighted fractional Sobolev spaces $X^{s,p}_{0,w}(Ω)$, where $w$ is a weight in the Muckenhoupt class $A_p$. This space is a natural extension of the fractional Sobolev spaces $H^{s,p}_0$, obtained by means of the Riesz fractional gradient $D^s$, to the setting of the weighted Lebesgue spaces $L^p_w$. As it happened in the unweighted space, the spaces $X^{s,p}_{0,w}(Ω)$ coincide with the weighted version of the Bessel potential space. We obtaien several structural properties for these spaces, as well as continuous and compact embeddings. We conclude with the study of a family of degenerate fractional elliptic partial differential equations.

AI.tldr: 引入带权分数阶Sobolev空间$X^{s,p}_{0,w}(Ω)$，研究其结构性质、嵌入定理，并应用于退化分数阶椭圆PDE
AI.motivation: 将分数阶Sobolev空间$H^{s,p}_0$通过Riesz分数阶梯度$D^s$推广到带权Lebesgue空间$L^p_w$，其中权函数$w$属于Muckenhoupt类$A_p$，建立带权分数阶函数空间理论
AI.techniques: 使用Riesz分数阶梯度$D^s$，Muckenhoupt权函数理论，Bessel位势空间方法，嵌入定理分析，退化椭圆PDE的变分方法
AI.main_theorems: 1) 证明$X^{s,p}_{0,w}(Ω)$与带权Bessel位势空间等价；2) 建立空间的结构性质；3) 获得连续和紧嵌入结果；4) 研究退化分数阶椭圆PDE的存在性和正则性
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶Sobolev空间理论到带权情形，为处理退化分数阶椭圆方程提供了合适的函数空间框架，在分数阶微积分和加权分析交叉领域有重要理论价值

title: On a large deviation principle for 1d cubic NLS with optimal decaying data
summary: In this article, we revisit the work of \cite{garrido2023large}, and prove large deviation principles for more general random initial data for cubic NLS. The Fourier coefficient of our random data admits an optimal polynomial decay.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有最优多项式衰减傅里叶系数的随机初始数据下立方薛定谔方程的大偏差原理
AI.motivation: 本文基于Garrido等人的工作，研究立方非线性薛定谔方程(NLS)在更一般随机初始条件下的渐近行为。原工作已建立某些随机初始数据的大偏差原理，本文旨在将结果推广到傅里叶系数具有最优多项式衰减的随机数据情形。
AI.techniques: 使用大偏差理论框架，结合随机分析技术，处理具有多项式衰减傅里叶系数的随机过程。可能涉及鞅方法、集中不等式、傅里叶分析以及非线性PDE的随机扰动理论。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了立方NLS在傅里叶系数具有最优多项式衰减的随机初始数据下的大偏差原理，推广了Garrido等人的结果，建立了更一般随机扰动下的渐近概率估计。
AI.significance: 扩展了随机PDE大偏差理论的应用范围，为具有更自然随机结构的非线性波动方程提供了概率渐近分析工具，对理解随机初始条件下NLS解的长期统计行为有重要意义。

title: Relaxation limit and asymptotic stability for the Euler-Navier-Stokes equations
summary: The Euler-Navier-Stokes (E-NS) system arises as a macroscopic description of kinetic-fluid interactions, derived from the local-Maxwellian closure of the Vlasov-Fokker-Planck-Navier-Stokes flow. In this paper, we investigate the singular limit of the system in $\mathbb{R}^d$ ($d\ge2$) when the relaxation parameter $\varepsilon>0$ tends to zero. In contrast to the Euler system with velocity damping, the E-NS model features only a weaker relaxation of the relative velocity, which makes it challenging to analyze its dynamics as $\varepsilon\rightarrow 0$. We develop an energy argument to show global-in-time error estimates between the E-NS system and its limit system, the so-called Kramers-Smoluchowski-Navier-Stokes (KS-NS) system. These error estimates enable us to prove the global existence and uniform-in-$\varepsilon$ regularity of the strong solution to the E-NS system in a hybrid critical Besov space with a sharp frequency threshold of order $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-1})$ separating the low- and high-frequency regimes. Moreover, the large-time asymptotic stability of the global solution to the E-NS system is established. More precisely, we derive the optimal decay rates of the solution uniformly in $\varepsilon$, and the enhanced decay rates for the difference between the densities of the E-NS system and the KS-NS system.

AI.tldr: 建立了Euler-Navier-Stokes系统在松弛参数趋于零时的奇异极限理论，证明了全局解的存在性、一致正则性和大时间渐近稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究从Vlasov-Fokker-Planck-Navier-Stokes流通过局部Maxwellian闭包导出的Euler-Navier-Stokes系统，分析当松弛参数ε→0时的奇异极限行为，该系统相比带速度阻尼的Euler系统只有相对速度的较弱松弛，给分析带来挑战。
AI.techniques: 发展了能量论证方法，在具有尖锐频率阈值O(ε⁻¹)的混合临界Besov空间中建立全局误差估计，分离低频和高频区域，使用一致正则性估计和衰减率分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 证明了E-NS系统与其极限系统KS-NS之间的全局时间误差估计；2) 在混合临界Besov空间中建立了E-NS系统强解的全局存在性和关于ε的一致正则性；3) 建立了全局解的大时间渐近稳定性，给出了关于ε一致的最优衰减率；4) 证明了E-NS系统与KS-NS系统密度差分的增强衰减率。
AI.significance: 为从动理学-流体相互作用导出的宏观系统建立了完整的奇异极限理论，提供了处理较弱松弛机制的分析框架，对理解多尺度物理系统的极限行为有重要理论价值，为相关模型的数学分析提供了新工具。

title: Regularity and pointwise convergence for dispersive equations on Riemannian symmetric spaces of compact type
summary: In this article, we first prove that for general dispersive equations on Riemannian symmetric spaces of compact type $\mathbb{X}=U/K$, of rank $1$ and $2$, the Sobolev regularity threshold $α>1/2$ for the initial data, is sufficient to obtain pointwise convergence of the solution a.e. on $\mathbb{X}$. We next focus on $K$-biinvariant initial data for certain special cases of rank $1$, depending on geometric and topological considerations, and prove that the sufficiency of the regularity threshold can be improved down to $α>1/3$, whereas the phenomenon fails for $α<1/4$ for the Schrödinger equation. We also obtain the same results for other dispersive equations: the Boussinesq equation and the Beam equation, also known as the fourth order Wave equation, by a novel transference principle, which seems to be new even for the circle $\mathbb{T} \cong SO(2)$ and may be of independent interest. Our arguments involve harmonic analysis arising from the representation theory of compact semi-simple Lie groups and also number theory.

AI.tldr: 证明了在紧型黎曼对称空间上，对于一般色散方程，Sobolev正则性阈值α>1/2足以获得几乎处处点态收敛，并在某些特殊情况下将阈值改进到α>1/3。
AI.motivation: 研究紧型黎曼对称空间上色散方程（如薛定谔方程、Boussinesq方程、Beam方程）的解的点态收敛问题，探索Sobolev正则性阈值与几何拓扑结构的关系。
AI.techniques: 利用紧半单李群的表示理论进行调和分析，结合数论方法，并提出了新颖的转移原理（transference principle）。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于秩1和2的紧型黎曼对称空间，一般色散方程的Sobolev正则性阈值α>1/2足以获得几乎处处点态收敛；2. 对于某些秩1情况的K-双不变初值，阈值可改进到α>1/3；3. 对于薛定谔方程，α<1/4时该现象失效；4. 通过转移原理将结果推广到Boussinesq方程和Beam方程。
AI.significance: 将经典圆环上的点态收敛理论推广到更一般的对称空间，建立了几何拓扑结构与色散方程收敛性之间的深刻联系，提出的转移原理具有独立的理论价值。

title: Weak-Strong Uniqueness and Relaxation Limit for a Navier-Stokes-Korteweg Model
summary: We consider a parabolic relaxation model for the compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg equations in the isothermal framework. This system depends on the relaxation parameters $α,β>0$ and approximates formally solutions of the compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg equations in the relaxation limit $α\to \infty$ and $β\to 0$. Introducing the class of finite energy weak solutions for the initial-boundary value problem corresponding to the relaxation model in spatial dimension three, we show that the weak-strong uniqueness principle holds. It asserts that a weak solution and a strong solution emanating from the same initial data coincide as long as the strong solution exists. Furthermore, we contribute a rigorous convergence result for the relaxation limit $α\to \infty$ and $β\to 0$ and thus justify the relaxation model as an approximate model for the compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg equations from a mathematical point of view. Our results hold for general non-monotone pressure-density relations.

AI.tldr: 建立了可压缩Navier-Stokes-Korteweg方程抛物松弛模型的弱解存在性、弱-强唯一性及松弛极限收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩Navier-Stokes-Korteweg方程的抛物松弛模型，该模型通过松弛参数α,β近似原方程，旨在从数学上验证松弛模型作为原方程近似模型的有效性
AI.techniques: 有限能量弱解理论、相对能量方法、弱-强唯一性原理、松弛极限分析、非单调压力-密度关系处理
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了松弛模型的弱-强唯一性原理；2) 证明了当α→∞且β→0时松弛模型解收敛到原Navier-Stokes-Korteweg方程的解；3) 结果适用于一般非单调压力-密度关系
AI.significance: 为可压缩Navier-Stokes-Korteweg方程提供了严格的数学近似框架，建立了松弛模型的数学合理性，扩展了非单调压力关系下的分析工具

title: Well-posedness of the motion of a rigid body immersed in a compressible inviscid fluid
summary: We consider a rigid body freely moving in a compressible inviscid fluid within a bounded domain $Ω\subset\mathbb{R}^3$. The fluid is thereby governed by the non necessarily isentropic compressible Euler equations, while the rigid body obeys the conservation of linear and angular momentum. This forms a coupled system comprising an ODE and the initial boundary value problem (IBVP) of a hyperbolic system with characteristic boundary in a moving domain, where the fluid velocity matches the solid velocity along the normal direction of the solid boundary. We establish the existence of a unique local classical solution to this coupled system. To construct the solution, we first perform a change of variables to reformulate the problem in a fixed spatial domain, and then analyze an approximate system with a non-characteristic boundary. For this nonlinear approximate system, we use the better regularity for the trace of the pressure on the boundary to contruct a solution by a fixed-point argument in which the fluid motion and the solid motion are updated in successive steps. We are then able to derive estimates independent of the regularization parameter and to pass to the limit by a strong compactness arguments.

AI.tldr: 建立了可压缩无粘流体中自由运动刚体耦合系统的局部经典解存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩无粘流体（非等熵欧拉方程）与自由运动刚体（线性和角动量守恒）的耦合动力学问题，这是一个在移动域中具有特征边界的双曲系统初边值问题与ODE的耦合系统
AI.techniques: 通过变量变换将问题重构到固定空间域，分析具有非特征边界的近似系统，利用压力边界迹的更好正则性，通过不动点论证交替更新流体和固体运动，最后通过强紧性论证取极限
AI.main_theorems: 建立了该耦合系统局部经典解的存在唯一性定理
AI.significance: 为可压缩流体与刚体相互作用这一重要物理问题提供了严格的数学理论基础，发展了处理特征边界和移动域耦合系统的新方法

title: The tangent space to the Wasserstein space: parallel transport and other applications
summary: We propose a new notion of the formal tangent space to the Wasserstein space $\mathcal{P}(X)$ at a given measure. Modulo an integrability condition, we say that this tangent space is made of functions over $X$ which are valued in the probability measures over the tangent bundle to $X$. This generalization of previous concepts of tangent spaces allows us to define appropriate notions of parallel transport, $\mathcal{C}^{1,α}$ regularity over $\mathcal{P}(X)$ and translation of a curve over $\mathcal{P}(X)$.

AI.tldr: 提出了Wasserstein空间在给定测度处的形式切空间新概念，将切空间视为取值于切丛上概率测度的函数空间。
AI.motivation: Wasserstein空间作为概率测度空间，其几何结构研究具有重要意义。先前关于Wasserstein空间切空间的概念存在局限性，需要更一般化的框架来定义平行移动、正则性等几何概念。
AI.techniques: 采用形式切空间的新定义，将切向量视为从底空间到切丛上概率测度空间的函数。通过可积性条件约束，建立Wasserstein空间的微分几何结构。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 提出了Wasserstein空间在给定测度处的形式切空间新定义；2. 基于此定义了适当的平行移动概念；3. 建立了Wasserstein空间上的C^{1,α}正则性理论；4. 定义了测度空间曲线的平移操作。
AI.significance: 为Wasserstein空间的微分几何提供了更一般化的框架，使得平行移动、正则性等经典几何概念能够在测度空间中得以定义，推动了最优输运理论与微分几何的交叉发展。

title: Calder{ó}n splitting and weak solutions for Navier-Stokes equations with initial data in weighted L p spaces
summary: We show the existence of global weak solutions of the 3D Navier-Stokes equations with initial velocity in the weighted spaces  , using Calder{ó}n splitting L p $Φ$$γ$ $\subset$ L 2 $Φ$ 2 + L r (with some r $\in$ (3, +$\infty$)) and energy controls in L 2 $Φ$ 2 .

AI.tldr: 证明了三维Navier-Stokes方程在加权空间中全局弱解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究三维Navier-Stokes方程在非标准函数空间中的解的存在性问题，特别是初始速度在加权空间中的情况，这扩展了经典L²理论的应用范围
AI.techniques: 使用Calderón分裂技术（L^pΦ^γ ⊂ L^2Φ^2 + L^r），结合L^2Φ^2空间中的能量控制方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了三维Navier-Stokes方程在加权空间中的全局弱解存在性定理，其中初始速度属于特定的加权函数空间
AI.significance: 扩展了Navier-Stokes方程解的存在性理论到更一般的函数空间，为处理具有奇异性的初始数据提供了新的数学框架，对流体力学中的偏微分方程理论有重要贡献

title: A mixed local-nonlocal Hénon problem in $\mathbb{R}^N$
summary: In this article, we study a Hénon-type equation in $\mathbb{R}^N$ driven by a nonlinear operator given by the combination of a local and a nonlocal term. This equation was originally proposed to model spherically symmetric stellar clusters. Here, we prove that, under a suitable relation among the parameters, there exists a threshold separating the existence and non-existence of solutions. Moreover, we establish regularity properties of the solutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了Hénon型非局部方程解的存在性与不存在性的阈值分离现象，并建立了解的正则性
AI.motivation: 研究由局部和非局部项组合驱动的非线性算子在R^N中的Hénon型方程，该方程最初用于建模球对称恒星团簇
AI.techniques: 结合局部与非局部算子的非线性分析方法，参数关系分析，阈值分离技术，正则性估计
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在参数满足特定关系时，存在阈值分离解的存在性与不存在性；2. 建立了解的正则性性质
AI.significance: 为恒星团簇建模提供数学基础，扩展了Hénon方程理论，发展了混合局部-非局部算子的分析方法

title: On Landis' conjecture in the plane for real-valued potentials with decay
summary: We investigate the quantitative unique continuation properties of real-valued solutions to planar Schrödinger equations with potential functions that exhibit pointwise decay at infinity. That is, for equations of the form $-Δu + V u = 0$ in $\mathbb{R}^2$, where $|V(z)| \lesssim \langle z \rangle^{-N}$ for some $N > 0$, we prove that real-valued solutions satisfy exponential decay estimates with a rate that depends explicitly on $N$. Examples show that the estimates established here are essentially sharp. The case of $N = 0$ corresponds to the Landis conjecture, which was proved for real-valued solutions in the plane in [LMNN20], while the case of $N < 0$ was previously investigated by the author in [Dav24]. Here, the proof techniques rely on the ideas presented in [LMNN20] combined with conformal transformations and an iteration scheme.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维平面薛定谔方程实值解在势函数幂次衰减下的定量唯一延拓性质，建立了依赖衰减指数N的指数衰减估计。
AI.motivation: 研究平面薛定谔方程 $-Δu + V u = 0$ 在势函数 $|V(z)| \lesssim \langle z \rangle^{-N}$（$N>0$）衰减条件下的定量唯一延拓性质，填补了N=0（Landis猜想）和N<0情况之间的理论空白。
AI.techniques: 结合[LMNN20]的思想、共形变换和迭代方案，将Landis猜想的证明技术推广到势函数衰减的情况。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了实值解满足指数衰减估计，衰减率显式依赖于N；构造例子表明估计本质上是尖锐的；将N=0（Landis猜想）和N<0的情况统一到同一理论框架中。
AI.significance: 完善了平面薛定谔方程唯一延拓理论，建立了势函数衰减速率与解衰减速率之间的定量关系，为相关反问题和控制理论提供了理论基础。

title: Symmetry for the wave equation on torus: sharp unique continuation and observability conditions for spacetime regions
summary: In this work, we discover a new symmetry structure for the 1D wave equations associated with spacetime observable regions: observable symmetry condition. This structure yields a new conservation law for forced wave equations and provides a necessary condition for unique continuation, observability, and controllability. Building on this symmetry, we establish a necessary and sufficient condition for unique continuation by introducing a weak GCC. Moreover, this symmetry serves as an essential complement to the classical GCC, allowing us to derive a necessary and sufficient characterization of observability and controllability through spacetime geometric regions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一维波动方程的可观测对称性条件，建立了新的守恒律，并基于此给出了唯一延拓、可观测性和可控性的充要条件。
AI.motivation: 研究一维波动方程在时空可观测区域中的对称性结构，旨在建立与经典几何控制条件(GCC)互补的新框架，解决唯一延拓、可观测性和可控性的刻画问题。
AI.techniques: 引入可观测对称性条件，建立新的守恒律，提出弱几何控制条件(weak GCC)，结合时空几何区域分析，将经典GCC与新的对称性结构相结合。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 发现一维波动方程的可观测对称性结构；2) 建立强迫波动方程的新守恒律；3) 基于弱GCC给出唯一延拓的充要条件；4) 结合可观测对称性与经典GCC，得到可观测性和可控性的充要刻画。
AI.significance: 为波动方程控制理论提供了新的对称性框架，建立了与经典GCC互补的理论工具，深化了对唯一延拓、可观测性和可控性几何本质的理解，具有重要的理论意义。
